# Eval run ledger

Every recorded evaluation run of the Voicestead harness, one entry per run, written by
`scripts/log_eval_run.py` from the run's own `benchmark.json`. Numbers are copied from
artifacts. The script refuses to write an entry when a required field is missing, and it
never computes or estimates a figure itself.

## Runs

<!-- BEGIN RUN INDEX (generated by scripts/log_eval_run.py; edits between markers are overwritten) -->
No runs yet — the first entry lands with S0.
<!-- END RUN INDEX -->

## Provenance legend

What the **backend** column says about a number's standing:

- **claude-cli** — generated through the local `claude` binary on a Claude Code
  subscription. Free to run, so run it often; treat these as iteration signals,
  not headline results.
- **api** — generated through the Anthropic API with pinned models. Reproducible.
  The official S0 sweep uses this backend, and only its numbers feed the public
  scorecard.
- **mock** — a `VOICESTEAD_MOCK=1` rehearsal with canned outputs. It proves the
  pipeline runs; it says nothing about writing quality.

## Recording a run

```bash
python3 tests/run_eval.py --cases tests/cases.json --runs 3 --out tests/results
python3 scripts/log_eval_run.py tests/results --slug weekly-sweep --notes "why this run"
git add docs/evals && git commit
```
